Volatile.reasoning: Mean reversion in volatile market with RSI2 close to overbought but ATR capped for risk

Bearish.reasoning: Calm oversold condition in downtrend — ATR filter excludes volatile days

Bullish.entry_condition: Close < SMA_20 and RSI2 < 30 and MACD_hist > 0
Bullish.reasoning: Buying pullbacks in confirmed uptrend; RSI2 below 30 ensures oversold entry with MACD momentum

Neutral.entry_condition: Close > SMA_20 * 0.99 and MACD_hist > -100 and RSI2 > 25 and RSI2 < 65
Neutral.exit_condition: Close < SMA_20 * 0.98 or RSI2 > 75 or RSI > 70
Neutral.reasoning: Entry when price near SMA_20 with MACD not deeply negative and RSI2 in middle range

Volatile.reasoning: Mean reversion in choppy market; RSI2 below 15 with ATR cap for risk management

Bearish.entry_condition: Close < SMA_20 and RSI2 < 15 and ATR_pct < 0.016
Bearish.reasoning: Calm oversold reversal in downtrend — ATR filter excludes panic-selling days

Bullish.entry_condition: Close > SMA_20 and RSI2 < 30 and MACD_hist > 0
Bullish.reasoning: Buying pullbacks in confirmed uptrend; RSI2 below 30 ensures oversold entry with MACD momentum

Neutral.entry_condition: Close > SMA_20 * 0.99 and MACD_hist > -100 and RSI2 >= 25 and RSI2 <= 65
Neutral.exit_condition: Close < SMA_20 * 0.98 or RSI2 > 70 or RSI > 67
Neutral.reasoning: Entry when price near SMA_20 with MACD not deeply negative and RSI2 in middle range
